items.title: 程序员纯用 Claude Code 搓了个对接飞书自动修告警的 Agent
items.content_html:
[程序员] 纯用 Claude Code 搓了个对接飞书自动修告警的 Agent

A developer created an AI agent using Claude Code to automate alarm resolution in Feishu. The agent analyzes logs, proposes solutions via cards, and executes fixes upon confirmation.

开发者利用 Claude Code 构建了一个自动处理飞书告警的 AI Agent。该工具可自动分析日志并生成处理方案，用户确认后即可执行修复。

Tags: claude · agent · feishu · automation

items.title: 本地部署 GLM-5.2 的门槛太高了，根本玩不起！
items.content_html:
[Local LLM] 本地部署 GLM-5.2 的门槛太高了，根本玩不起！

Deploying the GLM-5.2 model locally requires massive computational resources that are impractical for most users. Testing with multiple H20 GPUs failed to meet performance expectations for large-scale context handling.

本地部署 GLM-5.2 对硬件算力要求极高，普通用户难以负担。即使使用多张 H20 GPU 进行测试，也无法达到理想的上下文处理性能。

Tags: glm · llm · gpu · deployment

items.title: AI 浏览器真的效率提升大吗？大佬们说下使用经验
items.content_html:
[问与答] AI 浏览器真的效率提升大吗？大佬们说下使用经验

Users are discussing whether AI-integrated browsers offer significant efficiency gains over traditional browser plugins. The debate centers on whether these browsers provide unique value or just redundant features.

用户正在讨论 AI 浏览器相比传统插件是否真的能显著提升效率。争议焦点在于这种内置 AI 功能是提供了独特价值，还是仅仅是功能冗余。

Tags: browser · ai · efficiency

items.title: Coherent：针对计算通缩陷阱的电气化后时代 AI 数据中心架构师
items.content_html:
Coherent: Architect Of Post-Electrical AI Datacenters Against Compute Deflation Trap

Coherent focuses on architectural shifts in AI data centers to combat compute deflation. The article explores how infrastructure design must evolve to sustain value in an era of rapidly changing computing needs.

Coherent 专注于 AI 数据中心的架构变革，旨在应对计算通缩问题。文章探讨了在计算需求快速变化的时代，基础设施设计应如何演进以维持价值。

Tags: datacenter · ai · compute · investment

items.title: newtab01：一个基于书签驱动、以列表显示的新标签页 Chrome 扩展
items.content_html:
[分享创造] newtab01: 一个基于书签驱动、以列表显示的新标签页 Chrome 扩展

A Chrome extension named newtab01 provides a list-based, bookmark-driven interface for new tabs. It focuses on productivity by allowing users to manage links efficiently without visual clutter.

Chrome 扩展 newtab01 提供了一个基于书签驱动的列表式新标签页。该工具通过简洁的列表界面帮助用户高效管理链接，避免视觉干扰。

Tags: chrome · extension · productivity

items.title: 发现了一个非常好用的语音输入法，叫 SayIt
items.content_html:
[程序员] 发现了一个非常好用的语音输入法，叫 SayIt。

SayIt is an open-source voice input software for Windows that integrates Doubao and Deepseek APIs. It offers fast, accurate transcription and text refinement, filling a gap for Windows users.

SayIt 是一款开源的 Windows 语音输入软件，集成了豆包和 Deepseek API。它提供了快速准确的语音转文字与润色功能，弥补了 Windows 平台的相关空白。

Tags: windows · ai · voice · input

items.title: Fastenal：什么能证明其估值的合理性
items.content_html:
Fastenal: What Could Justify The Valuation

This article analyzes Fastenal's current stock valuation and the fundamental factors justifying its price. It examines the company's market position and growth prospects within the industrial supply sector.

文章分析了 Fastenal 目前的股票估值及其支撑价格的基本面因素。探讨了该公司在工业供应领域的市场地位和增长前景。

Tags: stock · valuation · fastenal

items.title: Granite REIT：仍低于净资产值，仍被低估
items.content_html:
Granite REIT: Still Below NAV, Still Underappreciated

Granite REIT is identified as being undervalued compared to its Net Asset Value (NAV). The report suggests that the market has not yet fully appreciated the company's real estate assets.

Granite REIT 被认为目前的股价低于其净资产值（NAV）。报告指出市场尚未充分认识到该公司的房地产资产价值。

items.title: 股市回调比看起来更健康
items.content_html:
Stock Market Pullback Is Healthier Than It Looks

Current stock market pullbacks are analyzed as a healthy correction rather than a sign of a crash. The author argues that such movements stabilize the market in the long run.

分析称目前的股市回调是一种健康的修正，而非崩盘预兆。作者认为这种市场波动从长远来看有助于稳定市场。

Tags: stock · market · finance

items.content_html:
Rayonier: A Unique REIT Yielding 5% With 42% Upside

Rayonier is highlighted as a compelling REIT investment offering a 5% yield. Analysts estimate a potential 42% upside based on current market conditions.

Rayonier 被认为是一项具有吸引力的 REIT 投资，提供 5% 的收益率。分析师根据当前市场状况估计其有 42% 的上涨潜力。

items.content_html:

The author shares their journey of testing four different note-taking apps. They reflect on finding a tool that best suits their thinking and writing process.

作者分享了自己尝试四款笔记软件的历程。反思了寻找最适合自己思考与写作工具的过程与心得。

Tags: productivity · notes · workflow

items.title: TMD 的无钥匙自行车锁是一个价值 280 美元的解决方案，用来解决 60 美元的问题
items.content_html:
TMD’s keyless bike lock is a $280 solution to a $60 problem

The article critiques the high cost of a new smart bike lock from TMD. It questions whether the added features justify the premium price compared to standard locks.

文章批评了 TMD 新款智能自行车锁的高昂售价。质疑在添加了额外功能后，相比传统锁具，该溢价是否合理。

items.title: 美伊互袭并指责对方违反停火协议
items.content_html:
US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire

Tensions between the US and Iran escalated as both nations exchanged strikes. Each side accuses the other of violating the previously established ceasefire.

美国与伊朗之间的紧张局势升级，双方爆发了互袭。各方均指责对方违反了先前达成的停火协议。

Tags: us · iran · geopolitics

items.title: Bashblog – 一个用于创建博客的单一 bash 脚本
items.content_html:
Bashblog – a single bash script to create blogs

Bashblog is a minimalist tool that uses a single bash script to generate static blog sites. It is designed for users who prefer simplicity and command-line interfaces.

Bashblog 是一款极简主义工具，仅通过一个 bash 脚本即可生成静态博客网站。专为偏好简洁和命令行界面的用户设计。

Tags: bash · blog · devops

items.title: Wayfinder Router：本地与托管 LLM 之间查询的确定性路由
items.content_html:
Wayfinder Router: deterministic routing of queries between local and hosted LLM

Wayfinder Router provides deterministic query routing between local and hosted LLMs. This helps optimize costs and performance by choosing the best model for a given task.

Wayfinder Router 实现了本地与云端托管 LLM 之间查询的确定性路由。通过为特定任务选择最优模型，帮助用户优化成本与性能。

Tags: llm · routing · api

items.title: Marfa Public Radio 让您安然入睡
items.content_html:

A discussion on the soothing nature of Marfa Public Radio programming. It touches on how radio content is being used for relaxation and sleep aid.

探讨了 Marfa 公共广播节目的治愈特性。讨论了广播内容如何被用于放松身心及辅助睡眠。

items.content_html:

一份关于使用 AMD Strix Halo 硬件设置 RDMA 集群的技术指南。涵盖了高性能计算所需的关键配置。

items.content_html:

The article explores the rise of membership-based luxury clearance platforms like On The List. These platforms act as intermediaries to sell surplus luxury inventory at steep discounts.

文章探讨了以 On The List 为代表的会员制奢侈品特卖平台的兴起。这些平台充当中间商，以极高折扣销售奢侈品库存。

items.content_html:
Why Kim Jong Un never talks about his mother - or her controversial bloodline

The article examines why the origins of Kim Jong Un's mother are kept secretive by North Korea. Her controversial background is viewed as a threat to the regime's legitimacy.

文章探讨了为何北韩政府对其领导人母亲的出身保密。其充满争议的背景被视为对政权合法性的威胁。

items.content_html:

Israel launched strikes in southern Lebanon despite a newly signed framework agreement. Hezbollah condemned the deal, leading to further instability in the region.

尽管新签署了框架协议，以色列仍对黎巴嫩南部发动了袭击。真主党对该协议表示谴责，导致地区进一步动荡。

items.content_html:
Teenage Engineering adds lo-fi mode, USB audio, and more to its KO II sampler

Teenage Engineering released a significant OS update (2.5) for the EP-133 KO II sampler. New features include USB audio, lo-fi modes, and advanced chopping capabilities.

Teenage Engineering 为其 EP-133 KO II 采样器发布了重大 OS 更新 (2.5)。新功能包括 USB 音频、Lo-fi 模式及高级采样切片能力。

items.content_html:

A devastating earthquake in Venezuela has left many trapped under rubble. Rescue efforts are ongoing as families desperately wait for news of their loved ones.

委内瑞拉发生的毁灭性地震导致许多人被困废墟。救援行动正在进行中，受灾家庭在绝望中等待亲人的消息。

items.title: 如何在退休期间工作而不削减社会保障金
items.content_html:
How to work in retirement without seeing your Social Security checks slashed

This article explains how to manage work income during retirement to avoid Social Security benefit reductions. It clarifies the rules regarding earnings limits before full retirement age.

文章解释了如何在退休期间平衡工作收入以避免社会保障金缩减。明确了在达到法定退休年龄前关于收入限制的相关规则。

items.content_html:
Americans’ 401(k) balances hit record levels last year. See how you compare.

Vanguard’s report reveals that 401(k) balances reached record highs for Americans last year. The data provides a benchmark for individual retirement savings comparison.

Vanguard 的报告显示，去年美国人的 401(k) 余额创下历史新高。该数据为个人退休储蓄水平提供了对比基准。

items.content_html:
This disease is more expensive than cancer and heart disease combined. And it’s only going to get worse.

A specific health condition is causing an escalating economic crisis for families and governments. The article highlights the urgent need for addressing its rising prevalence and costs.

某种特定疾病正引发家庭与政府日益严重的经济危机。文章强调了应对其患病率及医疗成本飙升的紧迫性。

items.title: 美国老年人首次可以通过联邦医疗保险获得 GLP-1 减肥药物
items.content_html:
Older Americans will soon have Medicare access to GLP-1s for weight loss for the first time. Here’s what they need to know.

Medicare beneficiaries will gain access to GLP-1 weight-loss drugs starting July 1. Patients are advised to consider the potential side effects, including muscle loss.

从 7 月 1 日起，联邦医疗保险受益人将首次获得 GLP-1 减肥药物。建议患者关注包括肌肉流失在内的潜在副作用。

items.title: 玛格丽特·阿特伍德称 AI 的问题是“垃圾进，垃圾出”
items.content_html:
Margaret Atwood says the problem with AI is ‘garbage in, garbage out’

Author Margaret Atwood shared her skeptical views on AI, citing the “garbage in, garbage out” principle. She warned about the limitations and biases inherent in AI-generated content.

作家玛格丽特·阿特伍德表达了对 AI 的怀疑，引用了“垃圾进，垃圾出”原则。她警告了 AI 生成内容中固有的局限性与偏见。

Tags: ai · literature · opinion

加拉加斯在自然灾害与持续动荡后面临严峻危机。文章记录了救援进展缓慢下，居民们的绝望与日益增长的愤怒。

A travelogue exploring the contrasting atmospheres of Moscow and St. Petersburg. The author reflects on the historical layering and cultural richness of both cities.

一篇探索莫斯科与圣彼得堡不同氛围的游记。作者反思了两座城市深厚的历史积淀与文化底蕴。

items.content_html:

A light aircraft collided with a high-rise building in Beijing's Chaoyang District, resulting in the pilot's death. Thirteen others on the ground were injured and are currently receiving medical treatment.

北京朝阳区一架轻型航空器撞击高层建筑，导致飞行员当场死亡。地面另有13人受伤，目前伤者正接受救治，事故原因正在调查中。

用户因办公显示器导致用眼疲劳，寻求高质量显示器推荐。其需求侧重于代码编写的舒适度，而非高刷新率等游戏性能。

items.content_html:

A devastating earthquake in Venezuela has claimed at least 920 lives, with many people still trapped under rubble. International rescue teams have arrived to assist in the urgent search and recovery efforts.

委内瑞拉发生强震，造成至少920人死亡，仍有大量民众被困废墟之下。国际救援队已抵达现场参与紧急搜救行动。

items.title: 「缓存命中率」是个伪指标，应该看未命中的缓存
items.content_html:
[分享创造] 「缓存命中率」是个伪指标，应该看未命中的缓存

The author argues that cache hit rate is a misleading metric for AI providers and proposes measuring the absolute value of missed tokens instead. A new dashboard tool is provided to help developers identify token waste in LLM interactions.

作者认为缓存命中率是误导性指标，并提出衡量未命中token的绝对值。工具展示了如何通过看板监控LLM调用中的资源浪费。

items.title: Figma：股价因AI恐惧下跌，但AI可能是重估的触发器
items.content_html:

Figma's stock price recently declined due to investor fears regarding AI's impact on design software. However, some analysts suggest that AI integration could actually serve as a positive catalyst for the company's valuation.

受AI对设计软件行业影响的担忧影响，Figma股价出现下跌。然而分析指出，AI整合有望成为公司估值重构的积极动力。

Following the easing of geopolitical tensions in a key maritime trade corridor, market analysts are evaluating the implications. The focus shifts to how this development impacts global supply chains and trade assets.

The United States conducted retaliatory strikes against Iranian targets following an attack on a cargo ship. Iran has accused the US of violating agreements and warned of further tensions.

Energy storage company Dyness has filed for a Hong Kong IPO after recovering from significant losses caused by purchasing lithium at peak prices. The company's financial report highlights the volatility of the battery storage market.

items.title: WordStar：作家的文字处理软件（1996）

items.title: 特朗普的“口头干预”掩盖了全球石油供应灾难，行业资深人士称现实可能导致油价上涨至135美元
items.content_html:
Trump ‘jawboning’ has masked a global oil-supply disaster, and the reality could mean $135 crude, says industry veteran

An industry veteran claims that President Trump's "jawboning" has masked a global oil supply crisis, and the current reality could drive crude oil prices to $135 per barrel. This suggests that market sentiment influenced by rhetoric may be obscuring fundamental supply issues.

一位行业资深人士声称，特朗普总统的“口头干预”掩盖了全球石油供应危机，而现实情况可能导致原油价格飙升至每桶135美元。这表明受言论影响的市场情绪可能掩盖了基本供应问题。

Two new cross-platform desktop application development frameworks, ElectroBun and Deno Desktop, have been introduced as lighter alternatives to Electron. They aim to reduce app size and improve performance by leveraging modern JavaScript runtimes and system WebViews.

Former Federal Reserve Chairman Alan Greenspan has passed away at the age of 100. He was a pivotal figure in American economic policy, leading the Fed for nearly two decades.

Young Chinese consumers, facing stagnant wages, are reportedly spending billions on "feelings," driving new economic trends. This includes purchases of items like a "sad toy elf" and the development of a robot police force.

据报道，面临工资停滞的中国年轻消费者正在斥巨资购买“感觉”，从而推动新的经济趋势。这包括购买“伤感的玩具精灵”等商品以及开发机器人警察部队。

The article warns against the dangers of 'vibe-coding,' using Bob Starr's website "Boomberg" as an example of a project that, despite initial success, suffered from a hidden SQL injection risk. It emphasizes the importance of robust security practices.

文章以 Bob Starr 的网站 "Boomberg" 为例，警示了“氛围编码”的潜在危险，该项目尽管取得了初步成功，但却存在隐藏的 SQL 注入风险。它强调了健全安全实践的重要性。

items.content_html:

Individuals training new AI models are admitting to using chatbots to perform their tasks instead of engaging in direct conversation. Experts warn that this "AI inbreeding" could diminish the capabilities and usefulness of future AI systems.

训练新 AI 模型的人员承认，他们不是直接对话，而是让聊天机器人来完成他们的任务。专家警告说，这种“AI 内部繁殖”可能会削弱未来 AI 系统的能力和实用性。

Tags: ai training · chatbots · ai inbreeding · future models

First round of US-Iran talks ends with encouraging progress, mediators say

The first round of US-Iran talks has concluded in Switzerland with what mediators describe as encouraging progress. This follows an agreement last week that sets a 60-day deadline for reaching a final deal.

美国与伊朗在瑞士举行的首轮会谈已结束，调解人称取得了令人鼓舞的进展。此前，双方于上周达成协议，为最终达成协议设定了60天的最后期限。

Tags: us-iran relations · diplomacy · negotiations · middle east

items.title: 派评 | 近期值得关注的 App
items.content_html:
派评 | 近期值得关注的 App

This review highlights several noteworthy applications that have recently come to attention. It aims to provide users with insights into useful and effective software options.

本次评测重点介绍了近期值得关注的几款应用。旨在为用户提供有关有用且有效的软件选项的见解。

Tags: app review · recommendations · software · mobile apps

items.title: 映界科技：一支00后团队的空间智能“赌注” | 水下项目
items.content_html:
映界科技：一支00后团队的空间智能“赌注” | 水下项目

MirrorSpace (映界科技), a startup founded by a team of young PhDs, is focusing on spatial intelligence for robots, aiming to bridge the gap in the embodiment AI industry. They have secured seed funding for their algorithms and hardware development.

成立不到三个月的「映界科技」（MirrorSpace）由一支平均年龄仅 24 岁的博士团队创立，专注于机器人空间智能，旨在弥合具身智能产业的短板。他们已为算法和硬件研发获得了种子轮融资。

Tags: robotics · spatial intelligence · embodied AI · startup

items.title: 特朗普支持的政治圈外人士在哥伦比亚选举中获胜，初步计票显示
items.content_html:
线索若隐若现：深入 Tim Cook 和 Nike 的商业连接

A political outsider backed by Trump has reportedly won the election in Colombia, according to initial vote counts. However, the rival candidate has stated that the preliminary results are not yet official.

据初步计票显示，一位得到特朗普支持的政治圈外人士在哥伦比亚选举中获胜。然而，其竞争对手表示，初步结果尚未正式生效。

Tags: colombia election · trump · politics · election results

items.title: 恩施龙船调，游土随川流
items.content_html:
Deno Desktop

This piece celebrates the natural beauty of Enshi's canyons, described as exceptional both nationally and globally. It evokes a sense of journey and immersion in the region's landscape.

这篇报道赞美了恩施峡谷的自然美景，其美景被誉为在全国乃至全球都属绝类。它唤起了在这片土地上旅行和沉浸的感受。

Tags: enshi · china travel · nature · landscape

items.title: 澳大利亚史上最大规模可卡因缴获案，警方突袭地下掩体
items.content_html:
Trump-backed political outsider wins Colombia election, initial count shows

Australian police have made the largest-ever seizure of cocaine, confiscating 2.7 tonnes worth an estimated A$816 million after raiding an underground bunker in western Sydney. This operation highlights significant drug trafficking activity.

澳大利亚警方在突袭悉尼西部的一个地下掩体后，缴获了创纪录的 2.7 吨可卡因，价值估计达 8.16 亿澳元。此次行动突显了重大的毒品贩运活动。

Tags: australia · cocaine bust · crime · drug trafficking

items.title: 俄军集结威胁被视为夺取顿巴斯关键的城市
items.content_html:
恩施龙船调，游土随川流

Russian troop build-up near Kostyantynivka poses a significant threat, as the city is considered crucial for controlling Ukraine's Donbas region. Its potential fall could pave the way for Russian forces to advance towards remaining Ukrainian strongholds.

俄罗斯军队在康斯坦丁诺夫卡附近的集结构成重大威胁，该市被认为是控制乌克兰顿巴斯地区至关重要的据点。其陷落可能为俄军向乌克兰剩余据点推进铺平道路。

Tags: ukraine conflict · russian military · donbas · geopolitics

items.title: 三星电子为员工引入ChatGPT和Codex
items.content_html:
Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas

Samsung Electronics is rolling out ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to its global workforce, marking one of OpenAI's largest enterprise deployments. This move aims to enhance productivity and innovation through AI integration.

三星电子正在向其全球员工推广 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex，这是 OpenAI 规模最大的企业部署之一。此举旨在通过人工智能集成来提高生产力和创新。

Tags: samsung · chatgpt · codex · openai
